[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011110 4
1 0010010 2
2 1110111 6
3 1111001 5
4 1110011 5
5 1111010 5
6 0101100 3
7 0010010 2

23 32 1111110 6
34 43 0111110 5
45 54 0011110 4 match 0
56 65 0011110 4 match 0
67 76 1110111 6 match 2
70 07 1111111 a

02 20 1111011 6
13 31 1111111 a
24 42 1111010 5 match 5
35 53 0111110 5
46 64 0010010 2 match 1 7
57 75 1111111 a
60 06 1111011 6
71 17 1110111 6 match 2

03 30 1111101 6
14 41 1110011 5 match 4
25 52 1111110 6
36 63 0111110 5
47 74 1110111 6 match 2
50 05 1111111 a
61 16 1110011 5 match 4
72 27 1111111 a

15 51 1111111 a
26 62 1111010 5 match 5
37 73 1111111 a
